content.json:
# 📧 Phishing to Compromise Chain
---
Traces the full phishing attack chain — from email delivery through URL clicks and attachment detections, to post-delivery ZAP actions, through to whether the recipient's account or device was subsequently compromised. Joins MDO email telemetry with Entra sign-in risk signals and MDE alerts.

content.query:
EmailEvents
| summarize
    TotalEmails = count(),
    PhishEmails = countif(ThreatTypes has 'Phish'),
    MalwareEmails = countif(ThreatTypes has 'Malware'),
    SpamEmails = countif(ThreatTypes has 'Spam'),
    Delivered = countif(DeliveryAction == 'Delivered')
| project TotalEmails, PhishEmails, MalwareEmails, SpamEmails, Delivered
content.title: Email threat summary

content.query:
EmailEvents
| where ThreatTypes has 'Phish' or ThreatTypes has 'Malware'
| summarize ThreatCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| sort by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Phishing & malware emails over time

content.query:
EmailEvents
| where ThreatTypes has 'Phish' or ThreatTypes has 'Malware'
| summarize ThreatCount = count() by DeliveryAction
| sort by ThreatCount desc
content.title: Threat email delivery outcomes

content.query:
EmailEvents
| where ThreatTypes has 'Phish' or ThreatTypes has 'Malware'
| where DeliveryAction == 'Delivered'
| summarize DeliveredThreats = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| sort by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Threats delivered to inbox over time

content.query:
EmailEvents
| where ThreatTypes has 'Phish'
| where DeliveryAction == 'Delivered'
| project TimeGenerated, SenderFromAddress, RecipientEmailAddress, Subject, ThreatTypes, DeliveryLocation, LatestDeliveryAction, AttachmentCount, UrlCount
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Phishing emails delivered to inbox

content.query:
EmailEvents
| where ThreatTypes has 'Phish'
| summarize PhishCount = count() by RecipientEmailAddress
| sort by PhishCount desc
| take 15
content.title: Top targeted users by phishing volume

content.query:
EmailEvents
| where ThreatTypes has 'Phish'
| summarize PhishCount = count() by SenderFromDomain
| sort by PhishCount desc
| take 15
content.title: Top phishing sender domains

content.query:
EmailEvents
| where ThreatTypes has 'Phish' or ThreatTypes has 'Malware'
| join kind=inner (
    EmailUrlInfo
    | project NetworkMessageId, Url, UrlDomain
) on NetworkMessageId
| summarize EmailCount = count() by UrlDomain
| sort by EmailCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Malicious URL domains in threat emails

content.query:
EmailAttachmentInfo
| where ThreatTypes has 'Malware' or ThreatTypes has 'Phish'
| project TimeGenerated, SenderFromAddress, RecipientEmailAddress, FileName, FileType, ThreatTypes, ThreatNames, SHA256
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Malicious attachments detected

content.query:
EmailPostDeliveryEvents
| summarize
    TotalActions = count(),
    PhishZAP = countif(ActionType == 'Phish ZAP'),
    MalwareZAP = countif(ActionType == 'Malware ZAP'),
    ManualRemediation = countif(ActionType == 'Manual remediation'),
    Failed = countif(ActionResult != 'Success')
| project TotalActions, PhishZAP, MalwareZAP, ManualRemediation, Failed
content.title: Post-delivery action summary

content.query:
EmailPostDeliveryEvents
| where ActionResult != 'Success'
| project TimeGenerated, RecipientEmailAddress, ActionType, ActionResult, ActionTrigger, DeliveryLocation, ThreatTypes
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Failed ZAP actions — emails not successfully remediated

content.json: ## 🔗 Cross-Layer: Phishing Recipient → Account Risk → Device Alert

content.query:
let PhishRecipients = EmailEvents
| where ThreatTypes has 'Phish'
| summarize PhishCount = count(), LastPhish = max(TimeGenerated), WasDelivered = countif(DeliveryAction == 'Delivered') by RecipientEmailAddress = tolower(RecipientEmailAddress);
let RiskySignins = SigninLogs
| where RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ('high', 'medium')
| summarize RiskySigninCount = count(), LastRiskySignin = max(TimeGenerated) by UserPrincipalName = tolower(UserPrincipalName);
PhishRecipients
| join kind=leftouter (
    RiskySignins
    | project RecipientEmailAddress = UserPrincipalName, RiskySigninCount, LastRiskySignin
) on RecipientEmailAddress
| project RecipientEmailAddress, PhishCount, WasDelivered, LastPhish, RiskySigninCount = coalesce(RiskySigninCount, 0), LastRiskySignin
| sort by RiskySigninCount desc, PhishCount desc
content.title: Phishing recipients who also had risky sign-ins — high priority investigation targets

content.query:
let PhishRecipients = EmailEvents
| where ThreatTypes has 'Phish'
| extend AccountName = tolower(tostring(split(RecipientEmailAddress, '@')[0]))
| summarize PhishCount = count() by AccountName, RecipientEmailAddress;
PhishRecipients
| join kind=leftouter (
    SecurityAlert
    | where isnotempty(CompromisedEntity)
    | summarize AlertCount = count(), AlertTypes = make_set(AlertName, 5) by AccountName = tolower(CompromisedEntity)
) on AccountName
| project RecipientEmailAddress, PhishCount, AlertCount = coalesce(AlertCount, 0), AlertTypes
| sort by AlertCount desc, PhishCount desc
content.title: Phishing recipients whose accounts also triggered MDE alerts

content.query:
EmailAttachmentInfo
| where ThreatTypes has 'Malware' or ThreatTypes has 'Phish'
| join kind=leftouter (
    EmailEvents
    | project NetworkMessageId, DeliveryAction, DeliveryLocation, Subject
) on NetworkMessageId
| project TimeGenerated, SenderFromAddress, RecipientEmailAddress, FileName, FileType, ThreatTypes, ThreatNames, DeliveryAction, SHA256
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Malicious attachments detected — with delivery outcome

content.query:
DeviceFileEvents
| where isnotempty(FileOriginUrl)
| where FileOriginUrl has_any ('mail', 'outlook', 'sharepoint', 'attachment', 'safelinks')
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FileName, FileOriginUrl, FolderPath, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessAccountName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Files downloaded from email origins on endpoints
